purpose: Classify every retained ninth-wave arXiv source row as domain_lead, adjacent_lead, or query_noise before any paper or outreach promotion.

classes.domain_lead: Directly relevant to the lane's target domain and suitable for source-body review.
classes.adjacent_lead: Useful for tooling, governance, infrastructure, or neighboring domains, but not direct enough for domain claims.
classes.query_noise: Retained by keyword overlap but unsuitable for the named lane without separate justification.

summary.boundary: Manual metadata triage only. This does not prove any paper claim or replace source-body review.

rows.reason: Tabular foundation models are relevant to clinical tabular data, but the title is not biomedical-specific.
Biomedical image interpretation is directly in scope.
Clinical foundation model and healthcare workflows are directly in scope.
Systems-biology uncertainty analysis is directly relevant to biomedical modeling.
Biomedical imaging uncertainty is directly in scope.
Software testing competition row, not biomedical despite query overlap.
Clinical QA over EHRs is directly in scope.
Biomedical and translational knowledge graph schema is directly in scope.
Embodied AI and service robotics are directly in scope.
Robotic application deployment infrastructure is useful but not a robotics capability claim.
LLM/logic-program generated MDPs for robotics are directly in scope.
Embodied AI survey is directly in scope.
Tabular foundation models may support robotics logs but are not robotics-specific.
Embodied AI, robotics, safety, and deployment are directly in scope.
Robot actions and embodied word embeddings are directly robotics-adjacent enough for source-body review.
Systems-biology uncertainty modeling is adjacent to protein design but not protein-design-specific.
Software testing competition row, not protein design.
Virtual organism and medical-target discovery are systems-biology/protein-adjacent enough for review.
Rip-current detection challenge is not protein design.
Speech translation row, not protein design.
Protein stability prediction is directly in scope.
Audio encoder challenge, not protein design.
AlphaFold and protein knots are directly protein-structure relevant.
AI scientist framing is relevant, but cybersecurity domain is not biomedical.
Robust AI-generated image detection is useful for provenance/safety, not biomedical automation itself.
Ethical AI governance is relevant to publication and risk boundaries, not biomedical proof claims.
Systems-biology uncertainty is useful context but not an AI-scientist automation paper.
AI safety report is useful risk context, not biomedical discovery evidence.
Autonomous scientific exploration is directly in scope.
Rip-current detection challenge is not biomedical AI-scientist work.

promotion_rule: Only domain_lead rows can enter official paper source-body review by default. Adjacent leads require a stated reason. Query-noise rows cannot support domain claims.
